scripts.ci: npm run test:frontend && npm run build && npm run test:backend
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name pixtooth-app
scripts.deploy:backend: set -a; [ -f .env.deploy ] && . ./.env.deploy; set +a; DEPLOY_ROOT=${DEPLOY_ROOT:-/root/pixtooth-backend}; RELEASE_ID=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S); ssh $VPS_USER@$VPS_IP "mkdir -p $DEPLOY_ROOT/incoming/$RELEASE_ID" && rsync -avz --delete --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.env' --exclude 'logs' --exclude '.git' server/ $VPS_USER@$VPS_IP:$DEPLOY_ROOT/incoming/$RELEASE_ID/ && ssh $VPS_USER@$VPS_IP "cd $DEPLOY_ROOT/incoming/$RELEASE_ID && DEPLOY_ROOT=$DEPLOY_ROOT BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-3100} BACKEND_HOST=${BACKEND_HOST:-127.0.0.1} API_DOMAIN=${API_DOMAIN:-api.pixtooth.com} RELEASE_ID=$RELEASE_ID bash scripts/bootstrap-vps.sh && DEPLOY_ROOT=$DEPLOY_ROOT BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-3100} BACKEND_HOST=${BACKEND_HOST:-127.0.0.1} RELEASE_ID=$RELEASE_ID bash scripts/deploy-release.sh"
